visual_description: A woman with voluminous curly blonde hair smiles broadly while seated in a busy restaurant. The camera then cuts to a man in a plaid sweater looking toward the left side of the frame, with other diners visible in the background. Finally, an older woman with short gray hair sits at a table with bottles and glasses, looking toward the right.
audio_description: Laughter and conversation are audible as the woman smiles and the man appears to speak. The older woman also appears to be speaking.
